text:
is a soldier of the Survey Corps who participated in the expedition where Commander Jorge Pikale and Angel Aaltonen investigated a restrained Titan.

Appearance

Holger is a tall man of medium build. His hair is dark and cut short, and he has a thin mustache. He wears the standard uniform of the Survey Corps.

Story

The Titan's Son arc

In an expedition beyond the Walls where the Survey Corps restrains a living Titan for Angel Aaltonen and Commander Jorge Pikale to investigate, Holger stands guard among the many other soldiers. Not long afterward, when the Survey Corps is attacked by Mammon and several other Titans, Holger is one of the few solders to maintain his composure, urging the others to heed Jorge's order to retreat. Jorge orders Holger to rally the panicked troops before they can retreat to Shiganshina District.

During the Corps' retreat back to Shiganshina, Jorge leaves Holger and Carlo in charge of leading the rest of the soldiers while he aids Angel and Sorum.
